query:
INSERT INTO quiz_answers (questionId, answerText, answerTextSwahili, isCorrect, `order`) VALUES 
(49, 'Grace that comes after we ask for it', 'Neema inayokuja baada ya kuomba', 0, 1),
(49, 'Grace that comes before we ask for it', 'Neema inayokuja kabla ya kuomba', 1, 2),
(49, 'Grace that only comes to perfect people', 'Neema inayokuja tu kwa watu kamili', 0, 3),
(49, 'Grace that only comes to church members', 'Neema inayokuja tu kwa wanachama wa kanisa', 0, 4),
(50, 'Going to church on Sunday', 'Kwenda kanisani Jumapili', 0, 1),
(50, 'Growing closer to God and becoming more like Jesus', 'Kukaribiana na Mungu na kuwa kama Yesu', 1, 2),
(50, 'Being perfect and never making mistakes', 'Kuwa kamili na kutofanya makosa', 0, 3),
(50, 'Believing in God but not changing your life', 'Kuamini Mungu lakini kutobadilisha maisha yako', 0, 4),
(51, 'Only praying and not helping others', 'Kuomba tu na kutosaidia wengine', 0, 1),
(51, 'Only helping others and not praying', 'Kusaidia wengine tu na kutoomba', 0, 2),
(51, 'Both loving God and showing love to your neighbor through action', 'Kupenda Mungu na kuonyesha upendo kwa jirani kupitia matendo', 1, 3),
(51, 'Leaving the world to live in a monastery', 'Kuacha dunia na kuishi katika monastery', 0, 4),
(52, 'Spend all, save nothing, give nothing', 'Tumia yote, usisave, usipe', 0, 1),
(52, 'Earn all you can, save all you can, give all you can', 'Kaza yote unayoweza, save yote unayoweza, jipe yote unayoweza', 1, 2),
(52, 'Only earn, never save, never give', 'Kaza tu, usisave, usipe', 0, 3),
(52, 'Give all, earn nothing, save nothing', 'Jipe yote, usikaze, usisave', 0, 4),
(53, 'To keep people busy', 'Kuweka watu wakiwa na kazi', 0, 1),
(53, 'To collect money from members', 'Kukusanya pesa kutoka kwa wanachama', 0, 2),
(53, 'Because spiritual growth happens best when people are honest, pray together, and hold each other accountable', 'Kwa sababu ukuaji wa roho hutokea vizuri zaidi wakati watu wanakamatiana, kuomba pamoja, na kujibu kwa kila mmoja', 1, 3),
(53, 'Because large groups are not important', 'Kwa sababu vikundi vikubwa si muhimu', 0, 4),
(54, 'Believing in God without changing your life', 'Kuamini Mungu bila kubadilisha maisha yako', 0, 1),
(54, 'Making choices every day that show you love God and love others', 'Kufanya chaguo kila siku kinachoonyesha kupenda Mungu na kupenda wengine', 1, 2),
(54, 'Only doing good things on Sunday', 'Kufanya tu mambo mazuri Jumapili', 0, 3),
(54, 'Being perfect in everything you do', 'Kuwa kamili katika kila kitu unachofanya', 0, 4)
